No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly aims to 'develop good exercise habits' and 'strengthen basic abilities,' directly promoting physical health and well-being, aligning with Target 3.4 on preventing non-communicable diseases.
evidence: 養成好的運動習慣 (develop good exercise habits)
強化田徑運動所需要的基礎能力 (strengthen the basic abilities needed for track and field)

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and focuses on 'technical practice' and 'skill development' in athletics, contributing to relevant skills (Target 4.4).
evidence: 技術練習、測驗 (technical practice, tests)

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly designated as '男女合班' (male and female co-ed), ensuring equal access and participation in physical education, which supports Target 5.1 on ending discrimination.
